race.comment: SIMPLY SASSY (11) has placed in both runs back from a spell and should be peaking now. She gets a nice run just off the speed here and takes holding out. VADERLEE (5) is going okay without winning, solid in a stronger race at Pakenham last time. That has him right in the mix in race weakened by scratchings. NAVAL FORCE (3) was good fresh and will be running on. BRAZENGA (6) went to the paddock off a win over this distance and wasn't far away when resuming last start. Can progress off that.
